Article: Limited edition platinum
[]: Limited edition platinum             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Dec 29, 2013 3:52 pm I'm about to drop 100+ dollars to replace my Evangelion collection, which is the Limited Edition Holiday Special version. I absolutely consider the buy to be worth it, but I'm looking just to make absolutely sure that there isn't any cheaper option that I don't know about. Anybody know of a good edition (w/ director's cut EPs) that I could find for under 124$?

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sun Dec 29, 2013 4:17 pm That's a tall order, as NGE os currently out-of-print in the US. (Not sure about Japan, though.) RightStuf used to have the last remnants going for around $30 for the complete collection, but now they only have Disc 1 and the "Director's Cuts" DVD in their bargin bin. (The last disc has interviews with Weta Worshop guys talking about when they would do if they designed a live-action Eva, if you fancy laughing at ADV for a while.)

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Dec 29, 2013 5:07 pm Looks like I'm going to lose an exorbitant amount of money, then. My poor, poor wallet. I apologize for mistreating you so. Also, to Nuke-kun from four years ago: FUCK YOU! YOU DESTROYED FUTURE NUKE'S HOLIDAY EDITION EVANGELION SET!
